publishedAbstract: During the upgrade or new installation of OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) in a disconnected environment, if it fails you may check the catalog-operator events and see the following error:_type: 'Warning' reason: 'ResolutionFailed' constraints not satisfiable:_ That indicates that you are missing a mirror image.
publishedTitle: OpenShift Data Foundation upgrade in disconnected environment with oc-mirror
